Off Calendar Apr-16-2012 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1156 Vallejo Street, #200 San Francisco, Ca 94109)
Off Calendar Feb-04-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Weinkauf for San Francisco Public Administrator.

The sale was confirmed at $840,000.00 subject to the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the petition (subject to a written order). No additional bond is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-01-2010 Granted Per Written Order
